long_description:
We have opened a JIRA to reset the failed ox2 profile https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/XLR8R-910 There was a NS_INSUFFICIENT_CAPACITY issue occurring earlier due to token namespace being present on the drive which has been fixed long time back and hostdevices still remained in failed state. This inc is to reset the failed hostdevices [first we are going with dal2-qz1-sr2-rk075-s22 where currently no vsis are present].

Step 1: Check if any vsis on the node
	    gt dal2-qz1-sr2-rk075-s22
	    virsh list
       If any, abort the process
Step 2: Check the list of nvme details on the node to check if token-ns is present using
       nvme list
Step 3: Check for orphaned device chunks
	   kubectl get deviceChunks -A --field-selector spec.Node.Name=dal2-qz1-sr2-rk075-s22
Step 4: Check for failed hostdevice details
       kubectl -n genctl get hostdevices --field-selector spec.Node.Name="dal2-qz1-sr2-rk075-s22" -o json | jq -r '.items[] | select(.status.deviceType=="ssd") | .metadata.name +" isFailed="+ ((.status.failed!=null)|tostring), .status'
Step 5: All are failing due to NS_INSUFFICIENT_CAPACITY, execute below runbook steps.

Step 6: Login to the deployer. If a bunch of hosts need remediating, consider starting a screen session first.
Step 7: cd ~/repos; rm -rf opal-ssd; git clone git@github.ibm.com:cloudlab/opal-ssd.git
Step 8: cd ~/repos/platform-inventory && git pull
Step 9: cd ~/repos/opal-ssd/helpers
Step 10: Create a file containing the list of hostnames for the Incident or what has been provided. To remediate an entire mzone, touch hostlist to create an empty file. For example: vi hostlist 
dal2-qz1-sr2-rk075-s22
Step 11: Optional: Run script in simulate mode to check activity: ./reset-failed-hostdevs.sh hostlist simulate hddc-only
Step 12: ./reset-failed-hostdevs.sh hostlist execute hddc-only
Step 13: We can check the status of newly generated hostdevices after 10 mins using
         kubectl -n genctl get hostdevices --field-selector spec.Node.Name="dal2-qz1-sr2-rk075-s22"
Incident source: https://opsdashboard.w3.cloud.ibm.com/ops/hostDevices/23314543C1BA - Prajna Lobo
